name: PSY-Frame Overload
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＰＳＹ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フレーム・オーバーロード
desc: Once per turn: You can banish 1 "PSY-Frame" monster from your hand or face-up from your side of the field, then target 1 card on the field; banish it face-down. During either player's turn, except the turn this card was sent to the Graveyard: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; add 1 "PSY-Frame" card from your Deck to your hand, except "PSY-Frame Overload".
eff: Once per turn: You can banish 1 "PSY-Frame" monster from your hand or face-up from your side of the field, then target 1 card on the field; banish it face-down. During either player's turn, except the turn this card was sent to the Graveyard: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; add 1 "PSY-Frame" card from your Deck to your hand, except "PSY-Frame Overload".

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
